summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of TrendScout platform completed successfully. All major features working correctly in demo mode with mocked APIs.

minor_bugs.issue: Signup form redirect to dashboard times out after successful form submission
Saved products not persisting in demo mode - shows 0 items despite save notification

passed_tests: Landing page loads with hero, features, and pricing cards (Starter £19, Pro £49, Elite £99)
Login page shows demo mode banner and allows login with any credentials
Signup page shows demo mode banner with functional form
Dashboard loads with all stats cards (Total Products: 10, Avg Trend Score: 75, High Opportunity: 5, Rising Trends: 4)
Dashboard shows top trending products list with 5 products and correct data
Discover page loads with product grid and all filter dropdowns functional
Product cards display trend score, margin, TikTok views, and badges correctly
Search functionality works (found Portable Neck Fan for 'neck fan' search)
Category and other filters working correctly
Product detail page shows full product info, pricing details, AI analysis, and market overview
Save product functionality shows success notification
Admin panel has all required tabs (Products, Users, Subscriptions)
Admin panel shows product table with functional edit/delete buttons
Add Product button opens form dialog with all required fields and dropdowns
Sidebar navigation works correctly between all pages
Demo mode operates as expected throughout the application
UI is responsive and user-friendly with proper loading states
